full_text:
Xu Yuan 徐原
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yuan (徐原). Asked Lu Mao to take care of his family when he became mortally ill. Xu Yuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
